Million Hearts® CVD Risk Reduction Model Medicare Data Files Codebook │ May 2025 │ V 1.1 
19 
FILE_COUNT 
LABEL: 
Number of Files Submitted for the Practice 
DESCRIPTION: Number of files submitted to the Million Hearts Data Registry (MHDR) for the practice. 
SHORT NAME: FILE_COUNT 
LONG NAME: FILE_COUNT 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
10 
FILE(S): 
Practice 
SOURCE: 
Million Hearts Data Registry 
VALUES: 
0, 3 
COMMENT: 
Practices were to submit
